name: How to Complete Module 01 — AI System Inventory
description: Identify and log every AI system in use across the organization, establishing the baseline for EU AI Act compliance.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt an AI System Inventory Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the AI System Inventory Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the AI System Inventory Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the AI System Inventory Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the AI System Inventory Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for AI System Inventory.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the AI System Inventory Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 02 — Risk Classification
description: Classify each AI system into its EU AI Act risk category (prohibited, high-risk, limited-risk, minimal-risk) based on intended purpose and impact.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a Risk Classification Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the Risk Classification Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the Risk Classification Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the Risk Classification Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the Risk Classification Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for Risk Classification.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the Risk Classification Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 03 — AI Literacy
description: Ensure staff have sufficient understanding of AI systems, their capabilities, limitations, and risks as required by Article 4.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt an AI Literacy Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the AI Literacy Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the AI Literacy Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the AI Literacy Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the AI Literacy Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for AI Literacy.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the AI Literacy Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 04 — Prohibited Practices
description: Identify and eliminate AI practices banned outright under the EU AI Act, such as social scoring and manipulative techniques.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a Prohibited Practices Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the Prohibited Practices Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the Prohibited Practices Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the Prohibited Practices Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the Prohibited Practices Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for Prohibited Practices.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the Prohibited Practices Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 05 — High-Risk Assessment
description: Conduct a detailed risk and conformity assessment for AI systems classified as high-risk.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a High-Risk Assessment Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the High-Risk Assessment Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the High-Risk Assessment Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the High-Risk Assessment Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the High-Risk Assessment Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for High-Risk Assessment.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the High-Risk Assessment Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 06 — Technical Documentation
description: Compile the technical documentation required under Articles 11 and 18 to demonstrate system compliance.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a Technical Documentation Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the Technical Documentation Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction
step.text: Use the Technical Documentation Work Instruction for step-by-step task-level guidance.

step.name: Checklist
step.text: Complete the Technical Documentation Checklist to confirm all required items are addressed.

step.name: Register
step.text: Record the relevant entries in the Technical Documentation Register.

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for Technical Documentation.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the Technical Documentation Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 07 — Human Oversight
description: Establish human oversight procedures ensuring a person can intervene in or override AI system decisions.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a Human Oversight Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the Human Oversight Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction

step.name: Evidence
step.text: Collect supporting evidence (documents, configs, records) for Human Oversight.

step.name: Declaration
step.text: Sign the Human Oversight Declaration confirming completeness and accuracy.

name: How to Complete Module 08 — Data Governance
description: Implement data governance controls covering training data quality, provenance, and bias mitigation.

step.name: Policy
step.text: Adopt a Data Governance Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

step.name: Procedure
step.text: Follow the Data Governance Procedure to systematically execute this module's requirements.

step.name: Work Instruction

step.name: Evidence

step.name: Declaration

name: How to Complete Module 09 — Logging & Monitoring
description: Set up logging and post-market monitoring systems to track AI system performance and incidents over time.

step.text: Adopt a Logging & Monitoring Policy defining scope, ownership, and update frequency.

name: How to Complete Module 10 — Incident Reporting
description: Establish procedures to detect, document, and report serious AI incidents to the relevant authorities.
